title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 231.340 - Streets and alleys in unincorporated towns, under control of county commission
text:
231.340.  Streets and alleys in unincorporated towns, under control of county commission. — All streets and alleys in unincorporated towns and villages shall be under the control of the county commission, and governed by the laws relating to roads and highways.
(RSMo 1939 § 8562) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 7915; 1919 § 10703; 1909 § 10505
